title: Fuwatti Spider
description: Replaces Spiders with Fuwatti/Blockman from Ao Oni.
body:
Simply replaces Spiders with Fuwatti/Blockman from Ao Oni, and also replaces some sounds.
_Ao Oni created by noprops_

Also check out [Ao Oni Warden!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ao-oni-warden) # Required Mods If you use **Forge** or **Fabric**, **[Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)** and **[Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)** are required.
Otherwise, if you use something like Optifine; you should be good to go.
